label: Yield Performance
description: Time series chart of yield performance across DeFi positions. Compares realised vs target APY over time.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets via WidgetBody.

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: Widget file has zero lib/mocks imports — data sourced exclusively via useDeFiData(); known mock-generator issue lives in defi-data-context.tsx (out of scope for widget file fix).

0.6.note: Loading covered by React.Suspense fallback in WidgetBody (widget-wrapper.tsx) plus empty-state guard when allSeries.length===0.

0.7.note: Empty state rendered at lines 65-71 ('No yield data available').

0.8.note: Error state covered by WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx — catches any thrown errors from context or render.

0.9.note: No dead code; 'comparison' ViewMode is a type-extension stub with no reachable UI path but causes no runtime issue.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets via WidgetBody. 0.2 requiredEntitlements: ['defi-trading'] set. 0.3 availableOn: ['defi'] set. 0.4 No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file. 0.5 Widget file has zero lib/mocks imports — data sourced exclusively via useDeFiData(); known mock-generator issue lives in defi-data-context.tsx (out of scope for widget file fix). 0.6 Loading covered by React.Suspense fallback in WidgetBody (widget-wrapper.tsx) plus empty-state guard when allSeries.length===0. 0.7 Empty state rendered at lines 65-71 ('No yield data available'). 0.8 Error state covered by WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx — catches any thrown errors from context or render. 0.9 No dead code; 'comparison' ViewMode is a type-extension stub with no reachable UI path but causes no runtime issue.

1.2.note: — defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() and uses globalScope for org/strategy filtering.

1.3.note: — yieldSeries memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk (fixed in defi-data-context.tsx).

1.4.note: — clientIds destructured and acknowledged; StrategyYieldSeries has no clientId field — client narrowing deferred to BP-5.

1.5.note: — yieldSeries memo filters by scopeStrategyIds.includes(s.strategy_id) when strategyIds are set; empty strategyIds returns all 8 series (satisfies 1.6). yieldSummary filtered by same logic.

1.7.note: KNOWN-GAP — strategy definitions (APYs, colors, names, capitals) are hardcoded in lib/mocks/generators/defi-yield-generators.ts; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS — widget reads exclusively via useDeFiData(). 1.2 PASS — defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() and uses globalScope for org/strategy filtering. 1.3 PASS — yieldSeries memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk (fixed in defi-data-context.tsx). 1.4 PARTIAL — clientIds destructured and acknowledged; StrategyYieldSeries has no clientId field — client narrowing deferred to BP-5. 1.5 PASS — yieldSeries memo filters by scopeStrategyIds.includes(s.strategy_id) when strategyIds are set; empty strategyIds returns all 8 series (satisfies 1.6). yieldSummary filtered by same logic. 1.6 PASS — empty scope returns all data. 1.7 KNOWN-GAP — strategy definitions (APYs, colors, names, capitals) are hardcoded in lib/mocks/generators/defi-yield-generators.ts; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

knownIssues: Mock import: yield generators (lib/mocks/generators/defi-yield-generators.ts used in defi-data-context.tsx, not widget file)
L1 1.4: StrategyYieldSeries has no clientId field — client-level narrowing deferred to BP-5 schema change
L1 1.7: strategy definitions (APYs, colors, capitals) in lib/mocks/generators/ instead of lib/constants/ or lib/config/ — BP-5 scope

findings.description: 0.5 Widget file clean — no lib/mocks imports. Known mock-generator import is in defi-data-context.tsx (deferred, out of widget scope).
1.3 yieldSeries was generated unconditionally — fixed: yieldSeries and yieldSummary memos return [] when !hasDefiDesk.
1.5 yieldSeries not filtered by strategyIds — fixed: memos filter by scopeStrategyIds.includes(s.strategy_id) when strategyIds are set.
1.4 StrategyYieldSeries has no clientId field — client-level narrowing cannot be applied without schema change. clientIds acknowledged in context. Deferred to BP-5.
1.7 Strategy reference data (APY targets, colors, capital allocations) live in lib/mocks/generators/defi-yield-generators.ts. Moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

l1FixedBy: defi-data-context.tsx — yieldSeries and yieldSummary memos with hasDefiDesk guard and scopeStrategyIds filter
